summary: Tested order notes and product notes functionality for POS system bug fixes. Backend API tests: 9/10 passed (1 skipped due to needing 2 products). All critical note-saving flows verified: create order with notes, fetch order preserves notes, update-items endpoint updates notes, add-items includes extras and notes.

minor_issues.issue: Warning message 'اختر فرع أولاً' (Select branch first) shown when no branch selected - expected behavior

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: OrderItemCreate model (line 1231-1238) includes 'notes' field for product-level notes
VERIFIED: OrderCreate model (line 1240-1257) includes 'notes' field for order-level notes
VERIFIED: create_order endpoint (line 4580-4777) saves both order.notes and item.notes to database
VERIFIED: add-items endpoint (line 4989-5040) includes item.notes and item.extras in new items
VERIFIED: update-items endpoint (line 5049-5108) updates items with notes and order-level notes
VERIFIED: POS.js buildPrintOrderData (line 1377) includes order_notes for receipt printing
VERIFIED: POS.js handleSaveAndSendToKitchen (line 1413-1430) uses update-items endpoint for editing with notes
VERIFIED: POS.js loadOrderForEditing (line 1030-1038) preserves product_name and notes when loading order
VERIFIED: Extras modal (line 4123-4244) has notes input with placeholder 'مثال: بدون بصل، حار جداً...'
VERIFIED: Kitchen dialog (line 3516-3527) has order notes input with data-testid='kitchen-notes-input'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - UI loads correctly, notes inputs verified in code

seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST_ prefix for notes testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order notes bug fixes verified. Backend API correctly saves and returns product notes (item.notes) and order notes (order.notes). Frontend POS.js has proper UI components: extras modal for product notes, kitchen dialog for order notes. The update-items endpoint (PUT /api/orders/{id}/update-items) correctly updates all items and notes when editing existing orders.

verified_features.feature: Create order with product notes and order notes
verified_features.details: Order created with Arabic notes 'بدون بصل' (product) and 'ملاحظات الطلب - تسليم سريع' (order)
GET /api/orders/{id} returns both product notes and order notes correctly
PUT /api/orders/{id}/update-items correctly updates item notes, order notes, and discount

verified_features.feature: Add-items endpoint includes extras and notes
verified_features.details: PUT /api/orders/{id}/add-items correctly saves new item with notes and extras

verified_features.feature: Frontend extras modal for product notes
verified_features.details: POS.js lines 4123-4244 - Input field with tempNotes state, saves to cart item

verified_features.feature: Frontend kitchen dialog for order notes
verified_features.details: POS.js lines 3516-3527 - Input field with orderNotes state, data-testid='kitchen-notes-input'
buildPrintOrderData (line 1377) includes order_notes for receipt printing

api_endpoints_tested.description: Add items with extras and notes

notes: All 4 bug fixes verified: (1) handlePrintBill includes notes:orderNotes, (2) Editing path uses update-items endpoint, (3) add-items includes extras field, (4) loadOrderForEditing includes product_name. The print agent (localhost:9999) runs on user's local Windows machine and cannot be tested in preview environment.
